series_metadata.series_description: Vendor contracts for services and purchases for State owned facilities that are bid formaintenance, janitorial, trash and snow removal, and lawn care. Files contain, but are not limited to, copies of invoices andcontracts, bid specifications and supporting documentation, estimates, and related correspondence. May also include vendorutility bills and cost summaries for Ohio Industries for the Handicapped.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office ; Electronic: in office 5 years
